_note: AquaFlow station set — 191 Bangkok drainage assets (สำนักการระบายน้ำ กทม.) across all 50 districts. The 18 lead entries are real named stations; the remainder are realistic per-district assets. Coordinates are APPROXIMATE (approx:true); the stations adapter replaces them with official data.bangkok.go.th / data.go.th geometry at runtime where it can verify a match. downstream = shared discharge node for the coordination rule (CP-N/C/S/W = Chao Phraya reaches, EAST = eastern outfall).
